sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Appropriation Act, 2014. Short title
(1) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Appropriation
sections.text:
t�ere may be expended from the general revenues oft he Republic,
such monies, not exceeding in the aggregate forty-six billion, six
hundred and sixty-six mill ion, five hundred and sixty thousand, seven
hundred and thirty-six kwacha as may be required for the services
of the Republic during the financial year ending on 31st December,

sections.heading: (2) The monies referred to in subsection (1) shall be appropri­
sections.text:
ated to the services of the Republic specified in the second column
of both the First Schedule and the Second Schedule, in amounts
not exceeding the amounts indicated in the third colwnn of both the
First Schedule and the Second Schedule.
(3) On the written authority of the Secretary to the Treasury,
the amounts shown under the subheads in the First Schedule and
under the programmes in the Second Schedule, may be varied,
except that the amounts appropriated to each subhead in the First
Schedule and the amounts appropriated to each programme in the
Second Schedule shall not thereby be altered.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 18.00 each.
